meaning: n.[医]血红素尿,血色蛋白尿
examples: All these cases had acute hemolytic anemia, jaundice, hemoglobinuria and reduced G6PD activity to different extents.
Objective: to study the effect of T-lymphocytes on hematopoietic progenitors in patients with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria.
Objective: to study the effect of T-lymphocytes on hematopoietic progenitors in patients with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH).
His fiance convinced him to see a doctor, and after months of tests he was diagnosed with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH), the first disease Soliris was approved to treat.
